allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); s=d[0] if d else {}; print\('name:', s.get\('name'\)\); print\('has description_html:', bool\(s.get\('description_html'\)\)\); print\('html preview:', \(s.get\('description_html'\) or ''\)[:200]\)")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3000/api/spells/public/search?q=benediction"; $s = $r[0]; Write-Host "name: $\($s.name\)"; $hasHtml = $s.description_html -ne $null -and $s.description_html -ne ''; Write-Host "has description_html: $hasHtml"; Write-Host "html preview: $\($s.description_html.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(200, $s.description_html.Length\)\)\)")
